name: trust-evidence-protocol
description: Evidence-first reasoning protocol with scoped records, workflow-guided context lookup, action preflight, and persistent project memory.

interface.shortDescription: Reason with claims, evidence, and safe hypotheses
interface.longDescription: Use an evidence-first reasoning protocol to separate truth from authorization, track provenance, classify claims, persist reusable context into records, and make safer changes based on supported claims and observations.
defaultPrompt: Use the Trust Evidence Protocol skill with TEP Runtime lookup, storage, and hook guardrails before making changes or decisions.
